flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central Wyoming College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.4k vs $40.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Wyoming College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (41.7% → 37.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Wyoming College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
